location: On a corpse guarded by a group of Demi-Humans in the woods south of the Forlorn Hound Evergaol, in southern Limgrave.

source.name: corpse guarded by Demi-Humans, south of Forlorn Hound Evergaol

tactics: From the Forlorn Hound Evergaol, head down the cliffs below it or loop in from the east through the woods to find the corpse.
A small pack of Demi-Humans guards it — weak individually, but they can swarm if not picked off one at a time.
Easy to miss since it's off the beaten path in the forest, away from the evergaol arena itself which many players visit only for the boss fight.
lore: Little more than a thick, solid length of wood. No finesse is needed to use it — just enough brute strength to swing it around.

builds.name: Early pure-Strength option
builds.why: C-scaling Strength and low stat requirements make it one of the earliest usable heavy Str weapons in the game, a good placeholder before finding a Brick Hammer or Great Mace.
